case_title: CLOTT, HELEN VS LAM, SKONSON CHAO et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLOTT, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, SKONSON CHAO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,021.00, SC#762925 CONSOLIDATED WITH 762920 AS BOTH CASES INVOLVE THE SAME PARTIES AND FACTUAL OCCURRENCES.
